{{Quote|I can only offer this low price because I got this cargo at a very low price myself … so buy it!|Chordak|<ref name="GG6-1" />}}
'''Chordak''' was the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] owner and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ''[[Oo-Ta Goo-Ta]]''. Commonly an independent [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]], he also worked as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]], even if he did not enjoy violence as much as most Rodians.

==Biography==
Born in [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] and raised in the traditional [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] culture of his [[Species/Legends|species]], Chordak discovered that he was less prone to senseless violence than his environment would have liked. Leaving his homeworld, Chordak eventually ended up in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]] in command of one of the fastest ships in the area, the modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Oo-Ta Goo-Ta]]''.<ref name="GG6-1" />

Often he played [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and ambushed his fellow [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captains]]. Using his superb demolition skills he rigged his target with explosives and then follow them through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] until reaching a remote area. He then triggered the bomb, crippling the ship and leaving them stranded.<ref name="GG6-1" />

At some point, Chordak encountered [[Sasnak Toxis]], a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] working for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Eventually they became enemies.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Some years before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Chordak traveled to [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] on the intent of selling two dozen [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] to the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]]. He met with Mytaranor leader [[Talas Piran]]. Unfortunately for them, the transaction was witnessed by Toxis and his allies, Rebel Alliance [[Officer/Legends|officers]] [[Alton Lochner]] and [[Derembus Sitnalta]]. Toxis even recognized one of the slaves as a person he liked, so he went berserk and attacked the slavers. The fight was only interrupted by the arrival of the [[Prefect/Legends|prefect]], with the Rebels escaping, but by then the slaves had escaped. Toxis regretted having lost a chance to get even with Chordak.<ref name="AIR" />

==Personality and traits==
Chordak was physically average for a Rodian in most respects, except for having a snout just a bit longer and skin a shade darker than average. Mentally however, he was different than the average Rodian—while most Rodians had no problem with killing for the sake of killing, Chordak had little taste for it. Still, while more cultured than the average Rodian, Chordak had no problem in engaging in a little violence, and he was unyielding.<ref name="GG6-1" />

His personal gear included a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], four [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]] and the ''Oo-Ta Goo-Ta.'' By building on the ''Oo-Ta Goo-Ta''{{'s}} reputation for speed, he hoped to come to the attention of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and receive more valuable Imperial assignments such as transporting [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] and messengers or the regular [[Prison/Legends|prison]] run to [[Gesaril]].<ref name="GG6-1" />
